data.title: 国际服活动特别MV「Starlight Connect」公布
data.summary: Finally~! The music video for Suzumi and Reisa's song, 'Starlight Connect', is now out! Go check it
data.body:
Finally~!
The music video for Suzumi and Reisa's song, 'Starlight Connect', is now out!
Go check it out right now!

➡️ Learn More: https://youtu.be/91zS8CzIOvk
